values.value:
== CUSTOM METADATA TYPE XML FORMAT ==
-- TYPE DEFINITION -- File path: objects/ApiName__mdt.object metadataType: CustomObject memberName: ApiName__mdt <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <CustomObject xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <label>Type Label</label> <pluralLabel>Type Labels</pluralLabel> <description>Optional description</description> <visibility>Public</visibility> <fields> <fullName>FieldName__c</fullName> <label>Field Label</label> <type>Text</type> <length>255</length> <required>false</required> </fields> </CustomObject> RULES FOR TYPE DEFINITION: - API name always ends with __mdt (e.g. My_Config__mdt) - visibility is Public (default), Protected, or PackageProtected - description is optional — omit entirely if not provided - Fields are embedded inside the same CustomObject XML - Supported field types: Checkbox, Date, DateTime, Email, Number, Percent, Phone, Picklist, Text, TextArea, LongTextArea, Url - Checkbox fields: use <defaultValue>false</defaultValue> instead of <required> - Text/TextArea fields: include <length>255</length> - LongTextArea fields: include <length>32768</length> and <visibleLines>3</visibleLines> - Number/Percent fields: include <precision>18</precision> and <scale>0</scale> - Multiple fields = ONE object file with multiple <fields> blocks - For DELETING a type: use destructiveFiles with type CustomObject, member = ApiName__mdt
-- RECORD -- File path: customMetadata/ApiName__mdt.RecordName.md metadataType: CustomMetadata memberName: ApiName__mdt.RecordName <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <CustomMetadata xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <label>Record Label</label> <protected>false</protected> <values> <field>FieldName__c</field> <value xsi:type="xsd:string">field value</value> </values> </CustomMetadata> RULES FOR RECORDS: - RecordName must be alphanumeric and underscores only, no spaces - Each field value needs correct xsi:type: Text/TextArea/LongTextArea/Email/Phone/Url/Picklist → xsi:type="xsd:string" Number/Percent/Currency → xsi:type="xsd:double" Checkbox → xsi:type="xsd:boolean" Date → xsi:type="xsd:date" DateTime → xsi:type="xsd:dateTime" - protected defaults to false - Each record is its own separate file - For DELETING a record: use destructiveFiles with type CustomMetadata, member = ApiName__mdt.RecordName
Custom Metadata Type definition and record XML formats
